should_trigger.query: The retention analysis in q2-retention.xlsx is checked. Should this become a dashboard, a deck, or a one-page readout for the CCO?
I have a notebook and three findings. Pick the smallest format that will help the operating team decide what to do next.
Audit the claims beside every chart in this quarterly deck. Check denominators, scales, uncertainty, and accessibility.
This line chart says onboarding drives retention. Tell me whether the visual and evidence actually support that statement.
Turn these checked churn findings into an answer-first executive readout with evidence, caveats, risks, and next actions.
Write the leadership narrative for this board deck from the approved analysis and audited visuals. Do not add claims.

should_not_trigger.query: Clean the duplicate rows and recalculate gross margin in this xlsx file.
should_not_trigger.reason: Spreadsheet data work belongs to Spreadsheets or Data Analytics.

should_not_trigger.query: Create a new brand illustration with a textured editorial style.
should_not_trigger.reason: Creative production belongs to the visual or brand production tools.

should_not_trigger.query: Build a raw-data forecasting model and tune its hyperparameters.
should_not_trigger.reason: Analysis and model training are outside this coordinator plugin.

should_not_trigger.query: Write a general employee announcement about the office schedule.
should_not_trigger.reason: No analytical source or decision-story workflow is present.

should_not_trigger.query: Design the onboarding screens for an iOS app.
should_not_trigger.reason: Mobile product design is outside this plugin.

should_not_trigger.query: Compare two language models on a support-ticket dataset.
should_not_trigger.reason: Model comparison belongs to Model Evaluation Lab.
